posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Manage your workflows across teams with Azure DevOps Connector
Hello, everyone! I’m Sachin Singh from the appserve.ai marketplace apps team, thrilled to announce the availability of our Azure DevOps Connector on the monday.com marketplace!

This integration brings seamless bi-directional synchronization between monday.com and Azure DevOps. It’s designed to streamline project management and foster effortless collaboration for development and business teams alike.

Key Highlights of the Azure DevOps Connector:

  • Real-Time Synchronization: Keep your Azure DevOps and monday.com boards updated instantly.
  • Enhanced Collaboration: Align technical teams with non-technical stakeholders for smoother communication.
  • Centralized Management: Track, report, and monitor development workflows from a single platform.
  • Customizable Workflows: Tailor the app to your specific team needs, enhancing productivity.

We’re committed to helping teams achieve better efficiency and control over their projects. Check it out here, and let us know what you think! Your feedback is invaluable.

Let’s take collaboration to the next level together!
